learning_roadmap.title: Market Analysis & Customer Insights: {first_gap}
learning_roadmap.description: Perform competitor research and validate client demand utilizing {first_gap} research frameworks.

learning_roadmap.title: Financial Modeling & Metrics: {second_gap}
learning_roadmap.description: Build a financial, unit economic, or demand model in Excel or Google Sheets using {second_gap}.

learning_roadmap.title: Landing Page or Outreach Test
learning_roadmap.description: Launch a one-page demand test or pitch deck to collect real signup or lead interest, validating assumptions.

ai_exposure_breakdown.ai_role: AI crawls public documents to list competitors and summarize market trends.
ai_exposure_breakdown.human_role: Human identifies key differentiation points, verifies sources, and builds relationships.

ai_exposure_breakdown.ai_role: AI writes spreadsheet formulas and models template structures.
ai_exposure_breakdown.human_role: Human inputs realistic driver assumptions and evaluates capital allocations.

ai_exposure_breakdown.ai_role: AI generates ad copies, newsletters, and email outlines.
ai_exposure_breakdown.human_role: Human shapes the brand voice, aligns storytelling, and signs off on strategic placement.

evolution_timeline.title: Business Analyst / Operator
evolution_timeline.description: Conduct competitor research, write clear product/business briefs, and compile performance spreadsheets.

evolution_timeline.title: Growth Manager / Product Operator
evolution_timeline.description: Orchestrate acquisition channels, manage analytics dashboards, run A/B demand tests, and manage budgets.

evolution_timeline.title: Business Leader / Strategy Lead
evolution_timeline.description: Define business strategy, manage high-value client relationships, structure mergers/partnerships, and scale operations.

future_self.headline: Future Business / Growth Strategist
future_self.narrative: {name} can excel by leveraging analytical thinking to build business systems. AI tools will automate documentation and analysis, but you will own customer relationships, strategic bets, and team execution.
future_resume_highlights: Conducted a demand validation test for a new {title} concept.
Designed a complete competitor landscape review and marketing strategy.
Established dashboard metrics to measure cost-per-acquisition and unit economics.

risk_heatmap.description: Routine reports and basic analytics generation are highly automated with modern AI agents.
Marketing tactics change, but fundamental principles of economics, psychology, and negotiation remain highly stable.
Crowded entry pool; differentiate through hard analytical skill, clean data habits, and validated execution proofs.
Handling financial resources, regulatory contracts, and user trust requires human accountability.
